name: Adult
info: This data was generated using meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct. Original information: https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/2/adult
description: The dataset contains information of individuals extracted from a census in the United States, and the goal is to determine the income bracket of each individual.

Age.description: the age of the individual in years.

Workclass.description: The nature of the individual's employment.

fnlwgt.description: a proxy for the demographic background of the people.

Education.description: The highest level of education attained by the individual, encoded by the corresponding qualification.

Education-Num.description: The highest level of education attained by the individual, ordinally encoded via an integer.

Marital Status.description: The marital status of the individual.

Capital Gain.description: The capital gain associated with the individual.

Capital Loss.description: The capital loss associated with the individual.

Hours.description: The number of hours worked per week.

Native Country.description: The native country of the individual.

Income Bracket.description: Whether the individual earns more than $50K, or less.
